name: Yellow Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the yellow squash until tender and drain.
2. Sauté the onions in margarine or bacon drippings.
3. Combine the cooked squash, sautéed onions, crumbled crackers, beaten eggs, salt, pepper, Tabasco sauce, grated cheese, and melted margarine in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Top with buttered Ritz Cracker crumbs.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes.
